text:
PDPs and regional Medicare Advantage Prescription Drug plans. 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: The name associated with this region code can be found in the variable called (REGION_NAME). 

The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by plan sponsors to 
CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS).
